items.title_en: S&P 500 ticks higher as benchmark approaches all-time high: Live updates
items.title_zh: 随着基准接近历史高点，标准普尔 500 指数走高：实时更新
items.desc_en: The S&P 500 ended Tuesday's session less than 1% from its all-time high set on Jan. 28.
items.desc_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数周二收盘时较 1 月 28 日创下的历史高点下跌不到 1%。

items.title_en: Struggling shoe retailer Allbirds makes bizarre pivot from shoes to AI, stock explodes more than 300%
items.title_zh: 陷入困境的鞋类零售商 Allbirds 奇异地从鞋子转向人工智能，股价暴涨超过 300%
items.desc_en: Allbirds announced a deal with American Exchange Group to sell its intellectual property and other assets for $39 million in March.
items.desc_zh: 3 月份，Allbirds 宣布与美国交易集团 (American Exchange Group) 达成协议，以 3900 万美元的价格出售其知识产权和其他资产。

items.title_en: Israel and Hezbollah continue attacks after Israel-Lebanon talks in US
items.title_zh: 以色列-黎巴嫩在美国举行会谈后，以色列和真主党继续发动袭击
items.desc_en: Israel strikes hit southern Lebanon and Hezbollah fires rockets at Israel, a day after rare direct negotiations.
items.desc_zh: 在罕见的直接谈判一天后，以色列袭击了黎巴嫩南部，真主党向以色列发射火箭弹。

items.title_en: Trump threatens to fire Fed chair Powell if he doesn't leave in May
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁美联储主席鲍威尔，如果他五月份不离开就解雇他
items.desc_en: Donald Trump's threat marks the latest escalation in his ongoing spat with Jerome Powell.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普的威胁标志着他与杰罗姆·鲍威尔的持续争执的最新升级。

items.title_en: Earned Income Tax Credit would rise to $5,500 per child under new Democratic measure
items.title_zh: 根据新的民主党措施，每个孩子的所得税抵免额将增至 5,500 美元
items.desc_en: The bill would also increase the maximum qualifying income to claim the EITC to nearly $100,000 annually.
items.desc_zh: 该法案还将申请 EITC 的最高合格收入提高到每年近 10 万美元。

items.title_en: Cleveland Fed President Hammack expects interest rates to stay on hold 'for a good while'
items.title_zh: 克利夫兰联储主席哈马克预计利率将在“一段时间内”保持不变
items.desc_en: The central bank official advocated a patient approach as officials watch incoming data for clues about where the U.S. economy is heading.
items.desc_zh: 这位央行官员主张采取耐心的态度，因为官员们正在观察传入的数据，寻找有关美国经济走向的线索。

items.title_en: Earnings are taking over from Iran. That's good for the stock market
items.title_zh: 盈利正在从伊朗手中接过。这对股市来说是好事
items.desc_en: Wall Street has been hyperfocused on the U.S.-Iran war for more than six weeks. That's starting to change as first-quarter corporate earnings pour in.
items.desc_zh: 六周多以来，华尔街一直高度关注美伊战争。随着第一季度企业盈利的大量涌现，这种情况开始发生变化。

items.title_en: Trump threatens to fire Powell if the Fed chair doesn't leave office on his own
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁称，如果鲍威尔不自行离任，他将解雇鲍威尔

items.desc_zh: 尽管过去大多数美联储主席在被替换后都离开了，但鲍威尔对他的计划提出了异议。

items.desc_zh: 目前还没有官方确认谁被杀或袭击者发生了什么事。

items.title_en: Trump accounts sign up 5 million kids, with 1.2 million eligible for $1,000 seed money, Bessent says
items.title_zh: 贝森特称，特朗普账户注册了 500 万儿童，其中 120 万有资格获得 1,000 美元种子资金
items.desc_en: Trump accounts have signed up 5 million kids, according to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent. Here's what families need to know.

items.title_en: Why BLTs and salad just got more expensive — tariffs, war send tomato prices soaring
items.title_zh: 为什么 BLT 和沙拉变得更贵——关税、战争导致番茄价格飙升
items.desc_en: Tomato prices have risen sharply in recent months, driven largely by trade policy, economists said.
items.desc_zh: 经济学家表示，近几个月来，番茄价格大幅上涨，主要是受到贸易政策的推动。

items.title_en: Booking.com customers warned of 'reservation hijacking' after hack
items.title_zh: Booking.com 客户被黑客攻击后收到“预订劫持”警告
items.desc_en: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.
items.desc_zh: 该旅游平台表示，它已更改 Pin 图以保护客户，但未透露有多少人受到影响。

items.title_en: Top Energy Democrat probes Trump administration's preparations for Strait of Hormuz closure
items.title_zh: 能源民主党高层调查特朗普政府关闭霍尔木兹海峡的准备情况
items.desc_en: The strait has been effectively closed since the U.S. launched a war with Iran, spiking energy prices and whipsawing markets.
items.desc_zh: 自美国与伊朗发动战争以来，该海峡实际上已被关闭，能源价格飙升，市场剧烈波动。

items.title_en: Trump's rift with Pope is playing out in public - it's costing him valuable support
items.title_zh: 特朗普与教皇的不和正在公开上演——这让他失去了宝贵的支持
items.desc_en: Leading conservative Catholics tell the BBC why they back the American pontiff in his spat with Trump.
items.desc_zh: 领先的保守派天主教徒告诉英国广播公司为什么他们支持美国教皇与特朗普的争执。

items.title_en: Iran war 'very close to over,' Trump says — and the stock market 'is going to boom'
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，伊朗战争“即将结束”，股市“将会繁荣”
items.desc_en: The U.S. has beaten Iran "militarily" and that the war is "very close to over," Trump said, claiming a peace deal likely.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普表示，美国已经在“军事上”击败了伊朗，战争“非常接近结束”，并声称很可能达成和平协议。

items.title_en: Trump warns that UK trade deal 'can always be changed'
items.title_zh: 特朗普警告英国贸易协议“随时可能改变”
items.desc_en: The US president says he gave the UK a "better" deal than he had to in an interview on Wednesday.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统在周三接受采访时表示，他给英国提供了比他必须做的“更好”的协议。

items.title_en: Bank of America is set to report earnings. Here's what to expect
items.title_zh: 美国银行将公布收益。这是值得期待的
items.desc_en: Bank of America, the second-largest U.S. bank by assets, has topped expectations for earnings per share for 23 consecutive quarters.
items.desc_zh: 美国银行是美国资产第二大银行，其每股收益连续 23 个季度超出预期。

items.title_en: Meghan to appear as guest judge on MasterChef Australia

items.title_en: Google to punish sites that trap people in with back button tricks
items.title_zh: 谷歌将惩罚利用后退按钮欺骗用户的网站
items.desc_en: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，将从 6 月份开始惩罚屏蔽后退按钮导航的网站。

items.desc_zh: NHS 指导从本月起所有医院都应使用 Palantir 软件，此举引发了强烈反对。
